merged_events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established when U.S. Ambassador James Grover McDonald presented his credentials.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic Relations were established when U.S. Ambassador James Grover McDonald presented his credentials on March 28, 1949.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both record the establishment of the Embassy on 1949-03-28 when Ambassador McDonald presented credentials. RDCR source with high confidence.
